data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Mass customer notification', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or tested. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving mass notifications, there is no concrete evidence of the actual implementation or execution of this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement, as it lacks the necessary validation.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or execution of mass customer notification functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
